name: Hither-Thither Staff
description:
This walking stick has a brilliant gemstone fitted at the top. This staff has 4 charges and regains {@dice 1d4} expended charges daily at dawn.
As an action, you can expend 1 charge from the staff to create two linked teleportation portals, each one appearing on a flat surface of your choice that you can see within 1,500 feet of yourself. Alternatively, you can expend 1 charge as an action to relocate one or both portals, subject to the same limitation. The surface on which a portal appears must
